form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (24.22) when sixth over 400m at The Gardens in a Grade 5. Has two wins and two placings from eight starts from the draw. Among the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (24.22) when sixth over 400m at The Gardens in a Grade 5. Has two wins and two placings from eight starts from the draw. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.15) at this track in a Mix 3/4, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and seven places from 20 starts. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (18.15) at this track in a Mix 3/4, finishing sixth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and seven places from 20 starts. Looks a leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth on March 21 over 300m at this track behind Frank Chana, beaten 8 lengths (18.56) in a Mix 3/4. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished eighth on March 21 over 300m at this track behind Frank Chana, beaten 8 lengths (18.56) in a Mix 3/4. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened in the back straight and made contact with the rail as a result.
Heels galloped on and lost ground rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Placed last time (17.25) at Casino in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 1.5 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting two wins and two places from five starts. Can feature in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (17.25) at Casino in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 1.5 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting two wins and two places from five starts. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Comes to this track for the first time. Comes off an average run last start over 352m at Q Lakeside when eighth behind Cashed Up Beth (20.65) in Grade 5. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes to this track for the first time. Comes off an average run last start over 352m at Q Lakeside when eighth behind Cashed Up Beth (20.65) in Grade 5. Looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide through the first turn.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (16.09) at big odds over 272m at The Gardens. Others preferred.

formComments.comment: Finished second last start (16.09) at big odds over 272m at The Gardens. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (18.24) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 11 length eighth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from five starts. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (18.24) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 11 length eighth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from five starts. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 300m in 17.68. Followed that up with a minor placing over 300m at Casino at Grade 5 six days ago. Solid showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 300m in 17.68. Followed that up with a minor placing over 300m at Casino at Grade 5 six days ago. Solid showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked out across heels and lost ground rounding the first turn.
Shifted in at the start, bumped the hindquarters and became unbalanced.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.25 lengths third (28.22) over 484m at Casino. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Momentarily encountered the rail after the completion of the event.
